name: LLM-Powered Agentic AI for 5G/6G Networks: A Tutorial and Survey on Architectures, Protocols, and Standardization
summary: arXiv:2607.16066v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Agentic Artificial Intelligence (AI), enabled by Large Language Models, marks a shift from rule-based automation toward autonomous, goal-driven con...
description: arXiv:2607.16066v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Agentic Artificial Intelligence (AI), enabled by Large Language Models, marks a shift from rule-based automation toward autonomous, goal-driven control of Next-Generation Networks (NGNs). Existing surveys treat the two domains in isolation, leaving protocol integration, evaluation, and standardization alignment underexplored. To address this gap...
author: Mazene Ameur, Abdelkader Mekrache, Bouziane Brik, Adlen Ksentini
